reviews.comment:
Una porquería, compramos unos sandwich simples de paleta y queso (no era jamón) carisimos y de tan secos se desarmaban solos. No tenían vasos para tomar la gaseosa, las mesas estaban sucias. Un desastre.
Recomiendo el Petrobras que se encuentra por el acceso a 25 de mayo, mucho mejor atención y productos.

(Translated by Google)
It was awful. We bought some simple ham and cheese sandwiches (not real ham) that were ridiculously expensive and so dry they practically fell apart. They didn't have glasses for the soda, and the tables were filthy. A disaster.
I recommend the Petrobras station near the entrance to 25 de Mayo; the service and products are much better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcVlmRzZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en la playa es muy buena. Tiene los baños en buen estado. Pero la tienda Full pesima atención, variedad cero. Las promociones de ServiClub parece que no existen en 25 de Mayo. Recomiendo parar a cargar combustible y ni entrar a la tienda full ni si quiera a comprar un caramelo. Comprenlo mas adelante no hay ni 4 km y tenes otra mucho mejor. No se porque es un ACA si no le llega ni a los talones a otros que son mas viejos que este.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the beach is very good. The restrooms are in good condition. But the Full convenience store has terrible service and zero variety. ServiClub promotions don't seem to exist in 25 de Mayo. I recommend stopping to fill up and not even going into the Full store, not even to buy a candy. Buy your gas further down the road; it's less than 4 km away and there's a much better one. I don't know why it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) if it's not even close to others that are older than this one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaW9uZFh3EAE
